# Atlas Consulting — Full Company Profile

## Company Overview

**輿圖顧問有限公司 · 亘帛（上海）資訊科技服務有限公司**
**Altas Consulting Service Co. Ltd**

Founded in 2020 with dual headquarters in Hong Kong and Shanghai, Atlas Consulting is a one-stop IT enterprise solutions provider specializing in systems, networking, security, and cloud services. Our mission is to be the IT bridge for enterprises going global — empowering Chinese enterprises to expand overseas with reliable IT infrastructure, while enabling international enterprises to enter China with localized IT architecture and compliance solutions.

**Key Strengths:**
- Microsoft Azure Expert Team
- 7×24 Bilingual Technical Support (Chinese & English)
- HK & China dual headquarters for cross-border delivery
- ISO standardized project management
- 100+ successful projects
- 20+ certified engineers
- 98% client satisfaction rate

---

## Services

### 1. AI & Innovation
Embracing the AI era with cutting-edge solutions:
- **AI Appliance Solutions** — Pre-configured AI hardware for LLM inference and training
- **Microsoft Copilot Deployment** — Enterprise-wide Microsoft 365 Copilot rollout and integration
- **GPU Cluster Deployment** — High-performance GPU infrastructure for AI/ML workloads
- **Digital Transformation Consulting** — Strategic advisory for AI adoption and digitalization
- **Virtual Office AI** — AI-powered office automation, agents + humans collaboration

### 2. Cloud Services
Comprehensive cloud solutions across major platforms (AWS, Azure, Alibaba Cloud, China Telecom Cloud):
- **Hybrid Cloud Architecture & Deployment** — Multi-cloud and hybrid infrastructure design
- **Cloud Migration & Optimization** — Lift-and-shift, re-platforming, and cost optimization
- **PaaS / Virtualization Services** — Platform-as-a-Service and virtualized environments
- **Cloud Security & Compliance** — Cloud security posture management, compliance frameworks

### 3. Infrastructure
Enterprise-grade IT infrastructure services:
- **Server & Storage Architecture** — Design, deployment, and management of server and storage systems
- **Virtualization & Hyper-Convergence** — VMware, Hyper-V, Nutanix, and HCI solutions
- **Infrastructure Optimization** — Performance tuning, capacity planning, and cost reduction
- **Disaster Recovery & Business Continuity** — DR planning, failover testing, and BCP implementation
- **Multi-site IT Integration** — Consolidation of distributed IT environments
- **Office Relocation IT Planning** — End-to-end IT migration for office moves

### 4. Network & Security
Enterprise-grade network and cybersecurity solutions:
- **SD-WAN / International Network Acceleration** — Optimized WAN connectivity for cross-border operations
- **Wireless Security Assessment** — Comprehensive Wi-Fi security audits and penetration testing
- **Fortinet / Aruba Solutions** — Firewall, switching, and wireless solutions from leading vendors
- **Network Security Audit** — Full security posture assessment and remediation
- **Structured Cabling** — Physical network infrastructure design and implementation
- **Firewall Deployment** — Next-generation firewall installation and configuration

### 5. Microsoft 365
As a Microsoft VAR + Delegated Admin Partner:
- **M365 Migration & Deployment** — Email, data, and workspace migration to Microsoft 365
- **SharePoint / OneDrive** — Document management, intranet portals, and collaboration platforms
- **Teams Unified Communications** — Voice, video, and chat integration
- **Security & Compliance** — Microsoft Defender, DLP, Information Protection, Conditional Access
- **Exchange Online** — Email hosting, hybrid deployments, and migration from on-premises

### 6. Hardware & Equipment
End-to-end IT equipment lifecycle management:
- **Equipment Procurement & Leasing** — Vendor sourcing, negotiation, and flexible leasing options
- **Equipment Maintenance & Support** — Warranty management, repair, and refresh cycles
- **Device Management** — MDM, endpoint management, and asset tracking
- **Data Erasure Services** — Secure data wiping compliant with international standards (NIST, DoD)
- **GPU Server Procurement** — Specialized hardware for AI/ML workloads

### 7. Professional Services
Leveraging 15+ years of industry experience:
- **IT Consulting & Project Management** — Strategic advisory, project planning, and execution (PMP-certified)
- **On-Site / Remote Engineer Support** — Flexible support models from L1 to L3
- **IT Training & Knowledge Transfer** — Custom training programs for client teams
- **Vendor Management & Procurement** — Multi-vendor coordination and procurement management
- **IT Audit & Assessment** — Infrastructure, security, and compliance audits

---

## Case Studies

### International Logistics Group
Full-spectrum IT managed services including office network revamp, cross-region relocation, and cloud acceleration solutions.

### AI Chip Technology Company
High-performance GPU cluster and InfiniBand network deployment for large-scale AI training and inference workloads.

### Financial Institution
Secure and compliant Microsoft 365 migration and hybrid cloud architecture for a leading financial institution, meeting regulatory requirements.

### Global Financial Data Group
China-region IT infrastructure setup and domain migration project for a world-leading financial data provider.

### International Trading Group
Long-term IT managed services with standardized SOPs and service level agreement management.

### Technology Company
Comprehensive wireless network security assessment identifying and remediating critical security vulnerabilities.

---

## Partners
- **Microsoft** — VAR + Delegated Admin Partner
- **AWS** — Amazon Web Services
- **China Telecom** — 天翼云 (e-Surfing Cloud)
- **Aruba HPE** — Networking and wireless solutions
- **Fortinet** — Cybersecurity solutions
- **Ingram Micro** — Distribution and logistics
